name: enzo-ai
description: Enzo AI - a self-hosted, local-first AI chat experience

scripts.dist: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist
scripts.dist:win: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:win
scripts.dist:mac: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:mac
scripts.dist:linux: yarn build && yarn build:desktop && yarn workspace @enzo-ai/desktop dist:linux
